title: Easy2Trade
description: Automate villager trading with a single click. Set a trade amount, choose the items you need, or use Max Trade for the best possible result.
body:
![EASY2TRADE](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e7c0fb1692a155a1ed70e2e5d0fc1c240f9b5aab.png)

# Easy Villager Trading

This mod is designed to save players time by automating repetitive villager trading.

Normally, trading with villagers requires selecting items and clicking through trades repeatedly, which can become tedious. This mod simplifies the entire process.

## Features

* Set the exact number of villager trades you want to perform
* Enter the amount of items you need, and the mod will automatically calculate and complete the required trades.
* Use **Max Trade** to scan your inventory and calculate the best possible trading outcome.
* Complete all trades with a single click.
* Stop trading at any time.
* Works with **all vanilla trading entities and professions**, including farmers, librarians, armorers, toolsmiths, weaponsmiths, clerics, cartographers, wandering traders, and more.
* Works with any trade type, whether it gives food, emeralds, books, tools, armor, enchanted items, or other rewards.

## Perfect For

* Emerald farming
* Villager trading halls
* Automated trading
* Large-scale villager setups
* Minecraft survival worlds
* Multiplayer servers
* Speeding up repetitive trades

## Recommended

For the best experience, we recommend using this mod together with any compatible **Unlimited Trading** mod.

## Compatibility

* **Client-side only** — only players need to install the mod.
* No installation is required on the server.
* Works in both **Singleplayer** and **Multiplayer**.

## Support

Discord: https://dsc.gg/trickomods
